records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Dissatisfied (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Dissatisfying.]

defs: To render unsatisfied or discontented; to excite uneasiness in by frustrating wishes or expectations; to displease by the want of something requisite; as, to be dissatisfied with one's fortune.
quotes: The dissatisfied factions of the autocracy.
